paper.title: OpenAI, Oracle, and SoftBank expand Stargate with five new AI datacenter sites
paper.abstract: OpenAI, Oracle, and SoftBank announce five new Stargate AI datacenter sites, accelerating a $500B, 10-gigawatt U.S. infrastructure buildout to power next-generation AI and create tens of thousands of jobs.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
